svg.title: Product owner unified inventory management
svg.desc: Shows all sales channels feeding into the product owner's central inventory, with stock deduction logic per channel

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the product owner central inventory dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('How does purchase/restock update owner inventory?')
sendPrompt('How does production recording work for the owner?')
sendPrompt('How do returns add stock back to the owner?')
sendPrompt('How does an own showroom sale deduct from owner stock?')
sendPrompt('How do sales from displaying showrooms work for the owner?')
sendPrompt('How do online dropship sellers deduct from owner stock?')
sendPrompt('How does the auto stock engine work across all channels?')
g.text: Recalculates on every transaction, all channels, atomic updates

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields are in the owner stock ledger?')
g.text: Available to sell | In transit | Returned

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the live stock dashboard look like?')
sendPrompt('What does sales by channel report show?')
sendPrompt('How does the showroom balance view work?')
sendPrompt('How do low stock alerts work for the owner?')
